commit.subject: ATM-298 - Autotest does not install both zfs and ldiskfs in mixed environments
commit.message:
ATM-298 - Autotest does not install both zfs and ldiskfs in mixed
environments

Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity clientcount=2 mdscount=1 \
                 osscount=1 mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
                 mgtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs

Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity clientcount=2 mdscount=1 \
                 osscount=1 mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
                 mgtfilesystemtype=zfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs

Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity clientcount=2 mdscount=1 \
                 osscount=1 mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
                 mgtfilesystemtype=zfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs \
                 standalonemgs

Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity clientcount=2 mdscount=1 \
                 osscount=1 mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
                 mgtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs \
                 standalonemgs

Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity clientcount=2 mdscount=1 \
                 osscount=1 mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
                 mgtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs \
                 combinedmdsmgs=false

Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity clientcount=2 mdscount=1 \
                 osscount=1 mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
                 mgtfilesystemtype=zfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs \
                 combinedmdsmgs=false fortestonly

Change-Id: I28b865151995df62ceafadd8ddfd0c88c57c33d9
Signed-off-by: Charles Olmstead <charlie@whamcloud.com>
